title: Behind the Scenes - Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, offered through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. The content covers artificial intelligence topics and is taught by David J. Malan and Brian Yu. The course is available across numerous community platforms including Discord, GitHub, and social media channels.
writeup: This is a behind-the-scenes look at the first chapter, titled "Playing," from CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence, taught by Brian Yu alongside David J. Malan as part of Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming. The course is distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with community presence on Discord, GitHub, and social media. The video sits within CS50's broader effort to make AI and computer science education openly accessible across multiple platforms.
